calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Ownership Of Real Property
Off Calendar Oct-21-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Heather Stoneman appeared by zoom for petitioner.

When asked if her client ever acted as co-trustee, Mrs. Stoneman stated that he signed the initial appointment very shortly after his brother's passing. Mrs. Stoneman also addressed the issue of conflict with respect to her client being the co-trustee and the administrator of the estate stating that he is simply following the terms of the documents and playing specific roles in each matter, that there is no disagreement within the parties as to what is occurring in these matters, that she has heard of no objections and that the parties are grateful for their help. The Petition to Determine Ownership of Real Property is under submission.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Gutierrez. Not reported.
